hero.title: Packers & Movers in Prayagraj
hero.subtitle: Civil Lines to George Town, Naini to Jhusi — 320+ verified movers in Prayagraj.

intro:
Prayagraj (formerly Allahabad) is a major administrative and educational hub on the Ganga-Yamuna confluence. ShiftIndia connects you with 320+ verified packers and movers covering Civil Lines, George Town, Naini, Jhusi, and surrounding areas.

Instant quotes, transparent pricing, no surprises.
whyUs: Prayagraj's mix of British-era bungalows, university campuses, and new Naini Industrial Area requires vendors with versatile fleets. Our network handles all types with equal care.

faqs.q: Do you cover Naini and Jhusi?
faqs.a: Yes — all areas including Naini Industrial Area, Jhusi, Phaphamau and Rambagh are covered.

faqs.q: What does a 2 BHK move cost here?
faqs.a: ₹6,000 – ₹11,000 locally. Exact quote depends on floors, distance, and packing needs.

faqs.q: Can you manage moves during Kumbh period?
faqs.a: Yes, our vendors are experienced with the city's traffic conditions year-round.
